debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

failed_attempts:
by
  cases h with f hf
  exists image f
  apply And.intro
  · intro A B heq
    apply set_ext; intro x; apply Iff.intro
    · intro hA
      have h : f x ∈ image f B := heq ▸ ⟨x, hA, rfl⟩
      cases h with x' hx'
      rw [←hf.1 _ _ hx'.2]; exact hx'.1
    · intro hB
      have h : f x ∈ image f A := heq.symm ▸ ⟨x, hB, rfl⟩
      cases h with x' hx'
      rw [←hf.1 _ _ hx'.2]; exact hx'.1
  · intro B
    exists {x | f x ∈ B}
    apply set_ext; intro y; apply Iff.intro
    · intro h; cases h with x hx; rw [←hx.2]; exact hx.1
    · intro hy; cases hf.2 y with x hx; exists x; rw [hx]; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩
